notes: Pass provides free admission; source: "at no cost".
raw: This is a Day Membership pass which allows two people to visit the Boston Athenaeum during operating hours at no cost. Pass holders are welcome to experience the Athenaeum as a member for a day, enjoy access to 12 floors of inviting spaces, with WiFi, well-lit work tables, cozy nooks, and beautiful city views.

source_phrases.max_people: allows two people to visit the Boston Athenaeum during operating hours at no cost
